title: Spawner Pickaxe Enchantment
description: Adds new enchantment for break monster spawners
body:
# Spawner Pickaxe Enchantment

## New Enchantment
This datapack will add new Enchantment (Spawner Breaker) to your game.

## How To Use
When you break monster spawner with Spawner Breaker enchanted item it will drop Monster Spawner and Spawn Egg.

## Obtaining Spawner Breaker Enchantment
You can get Spawner Breaker Enchantment via enchanting your pickaxe on Enchantment table. If you can not find Spawner Breaker Enchantment, you should power up enchantment with Bookshelf because this enchantment needs more level (25-65) like silk touch. When first time you get this enchantment via enchanting you will get Last Spawner Breaker achivement.

## Monster Spawn Eggs
When you break the Monster Spawner with Spawner Breaker Enchantment on different places you will get different monster spawn egg.
- Mansion: Spider Spawn Egg
- Stronghold: Silverfish Spawn Egg
- Mineshafts: Cave Spider Spawn Egg
- Nether fortress: Blaze Spawn Egg
- Bastion remnant: Magma Cube Spawn Egg
- Another places on Overworld: Random Spawn Egg (Spider,Skeleton,Zombie)

With you place broken spawner it wont spawn anything but with this eggs you can reactivate your spawner.

## Activate or Disable Datapack
When you activate datapack you should rejoin your world/restart your server because adding new enchantment is experimental feature. After restart you can use it. When you want to disable datapack and done it via '/datapack disable' command you should restart/rejoin again.


## Support Me
If you want to support me don't forget to visit [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/MrLeon07)

Also you can join my [Discord](https://www.discord.gg/vSNKYcBmYy) server
